title: The Glass Staircase
lines: You are ascending high above the orange desolation. The hangar is a mere toy below you, a rusted, geometric speck in a sun-scorched expanse.
The stairs are constructed from a material that feels like cold, absolute diamond. They are perfectly transparent, anchored by a geometry that defies the laws of physical space.
Ahead, the staircase terminates abruptly in a swirling, Stygian cloud layer. Hanging blindly from the mist is an ancient, knotted rope that smells of salt and old earth.

options.desc: 1. Grasp the knotted rope and continue the climb
2. Peer down at the vanishing desert far below
3. Turn back and descend the long staircase
